raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding a series of distressing events related to a recent transaction on my American Express card. The situation has caused significant stress and financial inconvenience, and I am seeking a resolution that includes a full refund and compensation for the difficulties experienced. 
Timeline of Events : XX/XX/year> : I made a booking at XXXX XXXX XXXX for a stay from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX, amounting to {$1800.00}. The transaction was authorized using the XXXX pass, and I believed everything was in order. 
XX/XX/year> : I received a notice that the transaction was declined. An email from the hotel stated, " Thank you for choosing our XXXX XXXX XXXX for your coming stay. As per your booking terms and conditions, you booked for a non-refundable booking and our system tried to charge you the full amount. Unfortunately, the payment was refused by your credit card company. '' Confused and stressed by the declination despite using the XXXX pass, I immediately sought alternative accommodation, given the impending nature of our vacation. Consequently, I booked another hotel at a higher price to ensure we had a place to stay. 
Further complicating matters, I received another email from the hotel confirming the cancellation of our booking due to the declined payment. To address this, I contacted American Express multiple times to explain the stress and inconvenience caused by this situation. 
Despite these efforts, I was shocked to discover that American Express eventually approved the initial charge after the declination, resulting in a double booking and double charges on my account. This has not only doubled our accommodation costs but also exacerbated our stress and inconvenience significantly.
